AppState.title: AppState
AppState.description: The entire application state for a user, including profiles, posts, and their own profile.

users/{userId}/appState/data.description: Stores the complete app state for a specific user. (Legacy/Fallback)

chunks.description: Number of data chunks saved for the AppState

users/{userId}/appState/meta.description: Stores the metadata, like the number of chunks for the AppState.

data.description: A JSON serialized chunk of the AppState

users/{userId}/appState/{chunkId}.description: Stores a chunk of the complete app state for a specific user.
